hero_body: GIDE is a real-time intelligent control engine with formal safety guarantees — one system, proven across robotics, markets, and software that improves itself.
pillar_safe_body: Control Barrier Functions, machine-checked in Lean 4 and Isabelle. Not tested — proven.
pillar_realtime_body: Closed-form continuous-time inference at 0.767 µs — 13,000× faster than real-time.
pillar_selfimproving_body: Neuroevolution and an autonomous Self-Dev loop that writes and verifies its own code.
section_domains_sub: Zig · C++ · Rust · Python · custom CUDA kernels
section_proven_body: Every safety guarantee is machine-checked through a formal-verification pipeline — Lean 4, Isabelle, and SMT solvers. When GIDE says a system is safe, there is a proof.
section_cta_body: Safety-critical control, autonomous systems, formal methods — we'd like to hear from you.
domain_cartpole_desc: 3D cart-pole balancing with machine-checked CBF safety proofs.
domain_quadrotor_desc: 6-DOF quadrotors with hybrid CfC / LQR / MPC control.
domain_markets_desc: Live FX trading, a 36-objective curriculum, Oanda connector.
domain_llm_desc: Entropy, grounding, and safety regulation for LLM control.
domain_selfdev_desc: A Self-Dev loop that specs, builds, and verifies itself.
footer_tagline: Real-time intelligent control with formal safety guarantees.
error_404_detail: That page drifted off the map — the link may be broken, or the page may have moved.
seo_default_description: GIDE is a real-time intelligent control engine with machine-checked safety guarantees — proven across robotics, markets, and software that improves itself.
seo_default_image_alt: DarcStar Technologies — GIDE, provably-safe autonomous control
about_page_description: DarcStar Technologies builds GIDE — a real-time intelligent control engine with machine-checked safety guarantees for safety-critical autonomous systems.
about_lead: DarcStar Technologies builds GIDE — the Guaranteed Intelligent Dynamics Engine: one real-time control system with formal, machine-checked safety guarantees, proven across robotics, financial markets, and software that improves itself.
about_mission_body_1: Autonomous systems are moving into places where failure is not an option — aircraft, industrial robots, live markets. Conventional testing can show that a controller usually behaves; it can never show that it will never violate a safety constraint.
about_mission_body_2: We close that gap by treating safety as something to prove rather than something to measure. When GIDE reports that a system is safe, there is a machine-checked proof behind the claim.
about_principle_proof_body: Every safety guarantee is machine-checked in Lean 4 and Isabelle — Control Barrier Functions verified as theorems, not inferred from passing test runs.
about_principle_realtime_body: Closed-form continuous-time inference runs in microseconds — fast enough to hold formal guarantees inside a live control loop, not just offline.
about_principle_oneengine_body: GIDE specializes at compile time instead of re-implementing control per problem, so the same verified core ships from quadrotors to financial markets.
about_cta_body: If you are building autonomous systems where a safety guarantee has to hold, we would like to hear from you.
contact_dialog_description: Tell us about your project — safety-critical control, autonomous systems, or formal methods. We read every message.
contact_field_message_placeholder: What are you building, and how can GIDE help?
contact_success_body: Thanks for reaching out — we'll get back to you soon.

contact_error_ratelimit: You've sent several messages recently — please try again in a little while.
contact_error_generic: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.
contact_ack_subject: We received your message — DarcStar Technologies

contact_ack_reply_note: Need to add something? Just reply to this email and it'll reach us.
